visual_description: A medium shot captures a man and a woman in what appears to be a hospital room. The man, standing on the left, wears a blue and grey plaid short-sleeved shirt. He gestures with his hands as he speaks to the woman. The woman is lying in a hospital bed, propped up on pillows. She wears a light-colored, patterned hospital gown and has a pink blanket covering her legs. She gestures with her right hand while looking at the man. A brown leather bag rests on the bed beside her. The background shows a typical hospital room with a curtain, a wall with medical equipment, and a light fixture. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the interaction between the two. A man begins to speak in a calm, slightly apologetic tone, saying, "I'm just gonna..." A woman interrupts him, her voice filled with aggressive accusation and anger. She yells, "See, see, it's because you were looking, you fat pervert!" Her delivery is sharp and confrontational. The scene cuts to a different angle, showing a man in a light-colored jacket standing and pulling back a hospital room curtain.
